backend.changelog: Generate on large assemblies no longer stops with 'close documents not part of this BOM' for the assembly's own deeply-nested sub-assemblies (they are in-use components and could not be closed). Only foreign DRAWINGS are now flagged; extra open sub-assemblies are harmless because Generate iterates the BOM, not whatever is open in SolidWorks. Combined with the earlier 'generate anyway' confirmation, large assemblies with auto-resolved references now generate. Source freshness unchanged.

cadBridge.changelog: Stability fix: reverts the automatic 'clean session' behaviour added in 1.8.56, which on large assemblies could close and reopen the model, mark documents as changed, and slow Generate down. Generate now behaves exactly as it did in 1.8.55. Recommended update for anyone on 1.8.56. To avoid the revision-conflict dialog on large assemblies, open the assembly into an empty SolidWorks session (close all documents first).
